feed.title: SAP Community - Data and Analytics
feed.subtitle: Data and Analytics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Share module nativescript doesnt exist in share scoped default
entry.content:
Hello experts, I'm encountering the following issue when updating my app after implementing the following NativeScript plugin @nativescript-community/audio.

Also when i try update the app a again i have the next error message.

entry.title: Re: Implement a standard fiori application on System ECC...
entry.content:
Hi @MaximoSanchez,

"Is it problematic that I have EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 - 08 (10/2017) FP installed when in fiori library says that I should have EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 - SPS 03 (08/2016) FP ?"

No. Anything more recent will suffice. SPS will contain bug fixes and enhancements to your ECC 6.0 that should not affect Fiori Apps.

"On the other hand, Fiori library asks to install 2 software components (SAP_APPL 618 - SP 0003 / GBAPP002 600 - SP 0012) and I only have SAP_APPL 618 - SP 0008. (it has SP 0008, not SP 0003).
So, should I install GBAPP002 600 - SP 0012, and regarding SAP_APPL 618 there would be no problem if it is SP 0008?"

Again, for SAP_APPL 618 any SP will suffice as long as it is greater that v3. 

Any missing Software Component needs to be installed.

You should use SolMan's Maintenance Optimizer to figure out what other SC are required to add or update.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Cross-tab table shows duplicates. How to remove duplicates?
entry.content:
I have a cross-tab table of terminations, and each employee has duplicates even though all fields are the same.

  • I do not have a Time Filter  in the data source to pull all Events (for terminations and hires)

In a Summary table, I am getting the right total (2):

But in a cross-tab table with employee details, I am getting multiple rows for the two employees:

I am using the same measure for both tables:

entry.title: Re: /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp is not a deployable CAP...
entry.content:
Hi @krishnakumar_nagarajan01,

If it works from a terminal command, then it has something to do with BAS.

Try refreshing your browser session. If it doesn't work, then try clearing your browser's cache.

If everything else fails, then open a support ticket.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Debug background jobs in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
How can we debug an external API in S4 HANA Public Cloud that is called in the background. In S4 HANA on-prem system, one way is to use SM50 and there are some other ways to debug batch jobs in test environment. Do we have any equivalent in S4 HANA Public Cloud and how to do that if this is possible?

Thanks,

Siva

entry.title: Re: Error while trying to migrate interface object from S...
entry.content:
Hi @ramu_g4,

Not all flows from PI/PO are subject to automatic migration. Some of them will require manual intervention.

Please have them connected and run the report to figure out which one will require manual intervention. 

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Restrict the creation of notification for specific PM order type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For Preventive Maintenance orders, Order is creating without notifications. But users can able to create the notification manually for the preventive maintenance orders also. Is there any standard configuration available to restrict the user from the creation of notification for Preventive maintenance order type only.

I removed the notification field in the field selection of the specific order type. Still create icon is available and user are able to create notification for the Preventive orders by clicking create icon.

entry.title: Job Requisition API data: fetch job detail/apply URL
entry.content:
Hello!

Is there a way to include the absolute URL to the details or application page for a job requisition when fetching jobs through the Job Requisition API (i.e. GET /JobRequisition)? Is there a separate API for fetching this information?

entry.title: Re: login plataform
entry.content:
Hi @jako1,

This is not the place to get that kind of support. We try our best to answer SAP technical questions. However, what you are asking is to solve some issue related to authentication. 

SAP ID Service and Universal ID are not to be used with a productive BTP account. Customers are encouraged to switch to an IAS tenant as soon as the global account gets provisioned and the first sub-account is created.

If you are trying to logon to an SAP system using Universal ID or SAP ID Service, please try clearing your browser's cache and refreshing the browser's cache. Also, all S-Users are not managed by SAP. So if you need to reset your password, you must get in touch with the user administrator of your company. They will be able to reset it at their end.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: BTP ABAP system start\stop
entry.content:
Thanks for clarification!

We have a payg for partners, I suggest it is considered like a trial

entry.title: Re: Import message mapping from SAP PO to Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi @ramu_g4,

Yes, that type of mapping is not supported by the automatic import of SAP Cloud Integration Suite Migration Tool. Not all PI/PO are subject for automatic migration. Some will require manual intervention whereas other will require a complete overhaul. 

That is a case where you must review the mapping and recreate it manually on CIS using the tools and techniques that it supports.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: How to transport Space and Replication Flows between tenants?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to know the standard process to transport Space and Replication Flows/Objects between tenants.

entry.title: Re: ODATA call to views in a HANADB from a Portal accessi...
entry.content:
Hi @Shamscharma,

HANA 2.0 runs applications on the Extended Application Server (XSA) which is compatible with Cloud Foundry.

An application in Cloud Foundry will only accept inbound request when there is a valid token in place. So, when you call this from your browser, you already have a session somewhere else (another tab) that gets used as means to retrieve a valid token and send it to the OData service.

When you perform the same via Postman, since you do not have a token yet, you get redirected to another page to enter your credentials. That will also happen if you try opening the same service on an Incognito Browser Session. 

Considering you are developing an API, to make the same call from Postman, you must call the oauth2 token end-point from your Hana box to retrieve a bearer token which can then be sent to your service as means for authentication. 

On the other hand, if you are developing a service that will be consumed on the XSA itself, then you must make use of SAP's App Router application (https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/approuter) and consolidaete all urls (service, front-end and xsuaa instance) there. App Router will perform a redirect to the identity provider of Hana for autentication and then generate a JWT token that can be forwarded to your service - all this is done automatically by the App Router.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: SAP EWM Screen Personas - Button selection
entry.content:
Hello everybody!

I am currently trying to optimise the RF screen from EWM with screen personas. One thing is driving me crazy! If I enlarge some of the buttons, the button select no longer works properly?

Here is an example:

For the first 5 buttons, the mouse pointer can be anywhere within the button and the selection just works fine, but not for button 6! Here the button is only recognised when I am exactly in the middle.

Button 1 to 5:

 

Button 6 - is only selected when I am in the centre!

If I set the properties back to default, the button can be selected normally again!

Is this related to the container? I have resized it! Is there a trick on how to deal with this? I've noticed this behaviour in other places and don't understand why!

I look forward to any feedback.

Best regards
Simon

entry.title: Re: Implement a standard fiori application on System ECC...
entry.content: thank you very much for your reply Ivan. best regards.

entry.title: Re: Release strategy in STO
entry.content:
for STOs -- UB is PO order type for Intra Company Stock transfers and NB is for inter company company stock transfers-- There are few options 

if can have CEKKO-BSART characteristic that help you trigger release on NB if classified but not UB

if you have different document type for your Intercompany STOs then you choose not classify those for release strategy--but if you have NB for normal procurement as well as STOs then you can following options 

1. Create different document other than NB to use for intercompany STOs 

2.  if you are using different P org for STOs then you CEKKO-EKORG -- 

3. for STOs creation --always choose default Purchase group (would need enhancement if you are doing auto POs--i guess)-- keep  CEKKO-BKGRP for all classifications but not for STO P Group 

You can think of more options if you think about it intelligently and come up a approach. 

Thanks,

Jagdeep

entry.title: Re: BTP ABAP system start\stop
entry.content:
Hi @KirillPalkov,

Since you use PAYGO for Partners, your instance might be running on plan "free" or "free-tier".

Go to the discovery center and look at the service's description for restrictions, notes or links to documentation. Usually you will find which caveats are there on the free plans. I bet that this service will have somewhere written that it stops every day to force you to start it only when needed.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: LMS - Failed to Extend Session
entry.content:
Hi, we have recently implemented SuccessFactors LMS for both Internal Staff and External Learners but we have been running into some session errors in both Test and Production. The most common error we see is the below 'Failed to Extend the Session' which we see in both the learner page while running eLearning and in the Learning Admin backend.

We have also been getting learners reporting their sessions have timed out during them taking eLearning, they get the below error saying 'A communication error occurred during the server ping to keep the session alive' 

After checking my browsers developer tools, I did come across a few issues related to CORS - Cross-Origin Resource Sharing, CORB - Cross-Origin Read Blocking and Invalid configuration option 'OWASP_CSRFTOKEN' (See attached screenshots) and I believe these are blocking LMS from pinging Bizx to keep the sessions alive  but I'm not sure if this is a Browser setting on our network or if it is some missing configuration on the SuccessFactors side. These issues don't happen for our External users as they are learner only users accessing through a Learning Site.

Has anyone else come across these issues before? Any help will be much appreciated.

Thanks

Stephen

entry.title: Where to download add-on SFIECPEP 100 from?
entry.content:
Hello,

We need to install add-on SFIECPEP 100 to use a utility that comes with it. We have Payroll in S/4-HANA but will be implementing SuccessFactors Employee Central with integration to S4 for employee data, payroll stays in S/4. The assumption is that this add on is installed in S/4 HANA but I do not see this in maintenance planner or software downloads. Any guidance on this or installation information would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

Elizabeth

entry.title: Re: Problem with 404 error Configuring SAP SuccessFactors...
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the same issue with many learning journeys I'm trying to do right now. Some Learning Journeys work. some dont. I get the error 404 aswell.
